title: Adjustment questions A1-A4
description: How to complete the adjustment questions A1 to A4 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: A1 Under 18 2018
child_links.description: Complete question A1 if you were under 18 years old on 30 June 2018.

child_links.title: A2 Part-year tax-free threshold 2018
child_links.description: Complete question A2 if you were not an Australian resident for the whole financial year.

child_links.title: A3 Government super contributions 2018
child_links.description: Complete question A3 if you made an eligible personal super contribution (not including amounts claimed as a deduction).

child_links.title: A4 Working holiday maker net income 2018
child_links.description: Complete question A4 if you were in Australia on a 417 or 462 visa and earned income.
